class.name: OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnifiedConfigurationAnchor
class.brief_description: The configuration used when creating the unified spatial context with anchors.

method.name: get_enabled_components
method.description: Returns the components enabled by this configuration. [b]Note:[/b] Only valid after [method init].

method.name: init
method.description: Initializes this [OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnifiedConfigurationAnchor], with the option to enable anchor persistence with [param enable_persistence].
